pi_items.source: Web search confirmed MSFT is the real ticker symbol for Microsoft Corporation trading on NASDAQ

Web search confirmed Line Break charts are a real technical analysis chart type and supported by NinjaTrader 8. References: ChartSchool, Wikipedia, NinjaTrader forum, and TradingView documentation all confirm this is a standard chart type.

Web search on 3-Line Break charts confirmed that 3 is the standard and most common value for line break charts. The chart requires a reversal that breaks the previous three lines to validate a new trend direction.
Web search and NinjaTrader documentation confirmed Stochastic Oscillator is a real momentum indicator available in NinjaTrader 8
Web search on Stochastic Oscillator parameters confirmed that 14 is the standard Period K (lookback period). StockCharts.com states 14 is one of the most common values, along with 5 and 9.
Web search confirmed that 3-period is the standard for the %D signal line (moving average of %K) in Stochastic Oscillators. The standard setting is usually (14,3,3).

Web search on Stochastic Oscillator confirmed that 3-period smoothing is the standard. The Full Stochastic Oscillator variant uses (14,3,3): 14-period lookback, 3-period %K smoothing, and 3-period %D smoothing.
Web search and NinjaTrader documentation confirmed ADX is a real indicator available in NinjaTrader 8. NinjaTrader forum references show ADX is commonly used with DMI indicators.

Web search on ADX confirmed that 14 is the standard default period. This is the original recommendation from J. Welles Wilder who developed the ADX indicator in 1978, and remains the most widely used default across trading platforms today.

Web search on NinjaTrader 8 default workspace location confirmed that workspaces are stored at C:\Users\<yourusername>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. The 'Docker' username in this case matches the environment configuration.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been independently verified. MSFT is the real ticker for Microsoft Corporation on NASDAQ. The task uses genuine historical MSFT price data in Yahoo Finance format (real daily OHLCV data from January 2023). The Line Break chart type with value 3 is a standard technical analysis chart type where reversals require breaking three prior lines. The Stochastic Oscillator (14,3,3) and ADX (Period 14) are both standard indicators with default parameters widely used across trading platforms. The workspace directory path follows NinjaTrader 8's default location pattern: C:\Users\<username>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. All instruments, indicators, chart types, parameters, and data sources are legitimate and real.
